title: Engineering Semantic Twin P3 Acceptance Criteria

status_rules.pilot_ready: All must_pass_items pass AND passed_count in [7,9]

acceptance_items.name: Runtime Semantic Graph 可构建
pass_criteria: Runtime graph endpoint returns graph nodes/edges for project runtime data
Graph response includes version_info and traceability

acceptance_items.name: 每次 Gate 执行有 Runtime Event
pass_criteria: Each gate evaluate/run writes a runtime event record
Event can be queried by project/form/time window

acceptance_items.name: 每个 Proof 可追溯到 SpecIR 和规范原文
pass_criteria: Proof contains spec/rule/normdoc linkage
Proof lineage can be reconstructed by proof id/hash

acceptance_items.name: 项目级 Compliance Dashboard 可运行
pass_criteria: Dashboard build API returns project-level compliance summary
Response includes risk/trust/review queue views

acceptance_items.name: BIM 构件可关联 Rule/Gate
pass_criteria: BIM linkage API can map object to rule/gate impacts
Affected BIM objects are queryable in runtime linkage view

acceptance_items.name: Sensor 数据可绑定 slotKey
pass_criteria: Sensor ingest can normalize and bind to slotKey
Gate trigger payload references bound slot

acceptance_items.name: Trust Score 可计算
pass_criteria: Trust evaluate API returns score and penalty breakdown
Score is reproducible for same inputs

acceptance_items.name: Runtime Replay 可执行
pass_criteria: Replay can run old/new rulepack version with historical_input_snapshot
Replay output contains old_result/new_result/diff/affected_gates/risk_change

acceptance_items.name: Mobile Runtime 可展示 Gate 结果
pass_criteria: Mobile runtime evaluate API returns gate outcome
Mobile page schema includes gate display fields

acceptance_items.name: Runtime Feedback 可回流到 SpecIR Review
pass_criteria: Runtime feedback detect can generate candidates
Candidates can be enqueued and actioned in SpecIR review queue

current_assessment.reason: Baseline acceptance definition created; project-specific evidence evaluation not filled.
